title: Freedom to Stipulate. Parties to the standard employment contract may
content: 12 stipulate other terms and conditions, including benefits, which should be over and above 13 the minimum requirements. Said stipulations should not be contrary to law, morals, good 14 customs, public order, or public policy. 15 16
